channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.8%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer leadership latest: Streeting resigns from cabinet ahead of expected challenge to PM
item.description: Starmer leadership latest: Streeting resigns from cabinet ahead of expected challenge to PM

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Who could replace Starmer as prime minister? Here are the top contenders for a Labour leadership battle

item.title: i Politics: What Burnham as PM could mean for your taxes, welfare and immigration
item.description: What Burnham as PM could mean for your taxes, welfare and immigration

item.title: ITVX: Wes Streeting resigns, paving way for leadership coup against Starmer | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Starmer Rival Streeting Quits, Paving Way for UK Leadership Bid - Bloomberg.com

item.title: LabourList: Wes Streeting resigns from Cabinet and says PM cannot lead Labour into next election
item.description: Wes Streeting resigns from Cabinet and says PM cannot lead Labour into next election

item.title: LabourList: Which Labour MPs are calling for Starmer to go - and who is still backing PM?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: It’s Rayner or no-one facing Starmer in Labour leadership contest, Corbyn says

item.title: Independent UK Politics: More Mandelson files ‘set to be released next week’ in yet another blow to Starmer
item.description: More Mandelson files ‘set to be released next week’ in yet another blow to Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why Rayner being cleared over her tax affairs is a problem for Streeting’s bid for No 10
item.description: Why Rayner being cleared over her tax affairs is a problem for Streeting’s bid for No 10
